channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Now parking in centre of road, 3rd March
item.description:
Now parking in centre of road while they go of to work . This is quite normal blocking in cars legally parked

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daniel Close, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags of rubbish opp 67 Darenth Rd, Welling, 3rd March
item.description:
Black bags of rubbish opp 67 Darenth Rd, Welling - bags have now been split open and are in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darenth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The sign indicating the route to St Johns Church, 3rd March
item.description:
This has been rotated west to indicate that the church is in The Park. It needs turning round.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Dog Poo/Fouling problem has been found, 3rd March
item.description:
A Dog Poo/Fouling problem has been found by Hackney Council
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green Bins Not Emptied, 3rd March
item.description:
Green bins were not emptied on Egerton yesterday
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Egerton Drive, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wrong colour paving in a conservation area, 3rd March
item.description:
The replacement paving is totally different colour to the ones that have been laid. The pink colour is unacceptable and given this is a conversation area I am not happy with this placement. I would like to request this is replaced like for like. The pink colour is unavoidable and makes our street look cheap. Please replace

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant Fly Tipping Around School Fencing, 3rd March
item.description:
In the fence surrounding Harris Peckham Academy on Highshore Roade and Lyndhurst Way, there are a number of trees where the fence is set back from the pavement. I don't know whether the school or Southwark Waste are responsible for maintenance and waste clearing, but they are never cleared, and each one is now knee-high with accumulated fly tipped waste, drug paraphernalia, bottles and leaves. It has become a real blight along both stretches of pavement with people dumping food waste which is hazardous to pets.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highshore Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags on the pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
Hello, Today I saw there are so many bin bags with rubbish left on the pavement near 245 Woolwich road. Also they put all their rubbish in my black bin,now I have no idea how to deal with my waste.I hope you can step up as soon as possbile. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge old Mercedes van abandoned in front of 2B Wroxton Road SE15 2BN, 3rd March
item.description:
This van, I suspect, was abandoned here by a local car/van service garage operating from and located in the vicinity on a road where there is restricted parking. I've often seen the same person towing and abandoning the vehicles on roads in the area where there is no restricted parking. Please have this van and the two long abandoned damaged cars on Lulworth road - a silver Ford Kar and a blue metallic Hyundia.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wroxton Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rogue traffic cone, 3rd March
item.description:
In woods. Https://w3w.co/warm.awards.bikes Pls collect. Ta.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in front of entrance to 373 Old Farm Avenue, Sidcup, Da15 8aa, 3rd March
item.description:
Pothole has been getting wider over the past month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-bikes from Forest blocking pedestrians, 3rd March
item.description:
Everyday we are dealing with Lime and Forest E-bikes blocking access to the buildings entrance in the area, blocking members of the public at the bus stop located at 68 Cornhill. Every morning, we, the users of 68,66,67 Cornhill have to move the bicycles from the entrance and side walk to be able or to access the building or to avoid an unfortunate accident. previously we reported the issue to Forest and Lime directly but, their action was to send an employee to move the bicycles closer to the wall, which still represents a hazard for members of the public. This issue has been ongoing for long time but it seems that there is lack of interest to solve this important and urgent problem which is getting worst and worst. Please, your assistant to this matter will be greatly appreciated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mansion House Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Need for street sweeping, 3rd March
item.description:
The junction of Siward and Wendover Road has lot of mud and wet leaves that have accumulated over years hence looks very unclean. As it is unclean, it also attracts littering by pedestrians. We request street sweeping to clear this debris and litter at the junction of Wendover Road and Siward Road in the stretch where the free parking is available. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Siward Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on grassed area LBB land by 220-246 Sandway Road, 3rd March
item.description:
The rubbish has been here for over 3 weeks. Please can this be removed urgently as it's being added to. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 220-244, Sandway Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 3rd March
item.description:
Pothole on mini roundabout and just off Maple Road in Padua Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, Maple Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling and littering at the junction of Wendover and Siward Road, 3rd March
item.description:
It is another unfortunate response that the report has been dealt with and closed when the dog fouling and littering has not been cleared. This is at the junction of Wendover Road and Siward Road. Reference number of the previous report is 8990311. I urge the council to look into this and prevent this from happening again happening again. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Siward Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 large potholes outside 97 halfway street, 3rd March
item.description:
Previously raised this request which was deemed within tolerance levels of a pothole. However it's obvious the entire surface course had been stripped away for all 3 potholes, leaving the binder course exposed. Additionally the size are longer than 200mm too. Please address the issue quickly as it's impacting my car suspensions every time I drive...
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 97, Halfway Street, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole with loose debris, 3rd March
item.description:
Has been there for a5 least 3 weeks and is getting worse. The loose debris is causing stone chips on cars parked nearby.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Green, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped cooker, 3rd March
item.description:
Cooker dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mariners Walk, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped plastic crates. Please remove., 3rd March
item.description:
Fly-tipped plastic crates. Please remove.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Speldhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
